title: Per-frame chat list string allocation in update()
description: main.rs:144-164 builds a Vec<(String,String,bool)> with fresh String allocations for every chat on every frame (60fps). At 200 chats this is ~400-600 small heap allocations per frame regardless of whether the chat list changed. The data changes only when ChatsLoaded fires. Fix: cache the rendered label strings in AppState alongside the chat Vec, and rebuild only in apply_event(ChatsLoaded). This eliminates all per-frame allocations for the chat panel.
